scripts.generate: mkdir -p build && wget -O ./build/openapi.json https://api.eulerstream.com/dashboard/openapi && npx @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i ./build/openapi.json -g go -o ./generated --additional-properties=packageName=eulerapi,moduleName=github.com/EulerStream/TikTok-Live-Api/sdk/go && rm -f ./generated/go.mod ./generated/go.sum && tsx ./scripts/fix-enum-conflicts.ts && tsx ./scripts/render-template.ts
